query: US spot Bitcoin ETF net flows late June 2026 and early July 2026, weekly trend from Farside Investors and SoSoValue. Are net outflows continuing into the week of June 29-July 3 2026? What is the Bitcoin price trend in late June 2026?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings:

**Yes, net outflows continued into the week of June 29–July 3, 2026** — the eighth consecutive week of outflows (~**$526.6M** net for the shortened US holiday week), but the week **ended with a sharp reversal**:

- **July 3, 2026:** +$221.7M net inflows — the largest single-day intake in ~2 months — snapping a **10-day/$2.73B outflow streak**. FBTC led (+$166M), while IBIT still posted a −$40.4M outflow.

**Broader context (record-breaking June):**
- June 2026 = worst month on record: ~**$4.06B** in net outflows (SoSoValue), IBIT ~73–75% of the total
- Final week of June alone: ~$1.79B
- 8-week streak total: >$8.2B; YTD flows turned negative (~$5.4B) for the first time since the Jan 2024 launch
- Flows turned negative again the following week (July 9: −$189M), so the July 3 rebound did **not** establish a sustained inflow trend

**Bitcoin price trend in late June 2026 — sharp decline:**
- Fell to **21-month lows under $58,000**; period low close of **$58,559 on June 30** (down ~11.7% from the June 15 high of ~$66,290)
- Recovered to ~$62,544 by July 3 (coinciding with the ETF inflow reversal) and ~$64,127 by July 10
- Crypto Fear & Greed Index at 23 ("Fear") on July 3; notably, whales accumulated 270K+ BTC (~$16.7B) near $59,000, diverging from the institutional ETF selling

All figures are cross-validated across Farside/Bitbo, SoSoValue-sourced reporting (KuCoin, CoinDesk, DailyCoin, Incrypted), and Yahoo Finance price data.

sources.title: Bitcoin ETFs See Over $526 Million in Outflows Over Four Days as Eight-Week Streak Continues
sources.snippet: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $526.64 million in outflows for the week from June 29 to July 3. Outflows continued for eight consecutive weeks.

sources.title: U.S. Spot Bitcoin ETFs Record $527M Net Outflows From June 29 to July 2
sources.snippet: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs shed roughly $527 million across four sessions June 29-July 2, extending a weeks-long withdrawal streak before a late reversal ($223.5M).

sources.title: Finally. $221 million flow into Bitcoin ETFs, ending a painful 10-day outflow streak
sources.snippet: U.S.-listed bitcoin ETFs saw $221.7M in inflows Thursday, ending a 10-day outflow streak. FBTC led with ~$166M; IBIT recorded a $40.43M outflow. YTD outflows ~$5.4B.

sources.title: Bitcoin ETF News: Inflows Hit $221M as 10-Day Outflow Streak Ends
sources.snippet: US spot BTC ETFs pulled in $221M on July 3, snapping a 10-day streak that drained $2.73B (SoSoValue). BTC rebounded to ~$61,700 after 21-month lows under $58,000.

sources.title: US Bitcoin ETFs Record $4.06 Billion in Net Outflows in June 2026
sources.snippet: US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded ~$4.06 billion in net outflows in June 2026 (SoSoValue), the worst month since January 2024 launch, eclipsing Feb 2025's $3.56B.

sources.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs Record $4.06B Monthly Outflows
sources.snippet: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded record $4.06B June outflows; lost $1.79B last week (third-largest weekly outflow). BlackRock IBIT accounted for 73% of June withdrawals.

sources.title: BlackRock's IBIT Led $4.06B June Exodus After BTC ETF News
sources.snippet: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $4.06B net outflows June 2026 (SoSoValue), IBIT ~$3.3B (~75%). Final week of June produced $1.79B in redemptions.

sources.title: Bitcoin ETFs Post Record Week of Outflows — $8.2B Leaked
sources.snippet: US spot bitcoin ETFs posted eighth consecutive week of outflows. During June 29-July 3, investors withdrew $526.64M. Over eight weeks, total outflows surpassed $8.2B.

sources.title: Bitcoin ETFs Shed $7B Across Two Record Outflow Streaks in 2026
sources.snippet: US spot Bitcoin ETFs logged 10 consecutive outflow sessions in May and 13 in June 2026, draining ~$7.2B and flipping YTD flows negative for the first time.

sources.title: Bitcoin ETFs Take In $221.7M, Snapping a 10-Day, $2.7B Outflow Streak
sources.snippet: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $221.7M net inflows July 3. BTC traded at $61,675, up 2.4% after dipping below $59,000. Crypto Fear & Greed Index at 23 ('Fear').

sources.title: Bitcoin ETF Flows [Table & Chart]
sources.snippet: Daily total net flow table: Jul 09 2026 -189.0M; Jul 07 2026 +11.2M (Farside-sourced data).

sources.title: Bitcoin Whales Buy 270K BTC as ETF Outflows Hit Record
sources.snippet: In two weeks ending early July 2026, whale addresses accumulated 270,000+ BTC (~$16.7B) near $59,000, even as US spot ETFs saw record outflows.
